actionUnits.condition: HouseController (MonoBehaviour fileID 821553098848002451, script GUID 340adb04e4e259e4b9c3e716ea2e6ced) is attached to GameObject 'House'. Serialized config: windowGlassObjects=[821553098795559414, 821553099003664447, 821553098404871707, 821553099487161785], lightsOnEmissionColor=(27.53272,7.6399693,0,0), lightsOffEmissionColor=(0.26855642,0.5613641,0.6698113,0), lightStatus=false, switchSound=AudioSource(fileID 821553098848002450). Precondition: Allow direct invocation of public method with no parameters. Expected: changeLights sets each windowGlassObjects[*].Renderer.material._EmissionColor to lightsOffEmissionColor and enables _EMISSION.

To cover Update() branch and AudioSource.Play: At runtime, toggle HouseController.lightStatus from false to true via test harness/inspector or an exposed UnityEvent (if available). No direct method exists to toggle this in the script. Expected: In the next Update() frame, script detects the change (currentLightStatus != lightStatus), updates currentLightStatus, calls changeLights (which sets emission to lightsOnEmissionColor), and plays switchSound (AudioSource fileID 821553098848002450).
